name: Boyd Group Services Inc.
description: Boyd Group Services Inc. is a Canadian corporation that operates multi-location collision repair centers in North America. Operating under the trade names Boyd Autobody & Glass and Assured Automotive in Canada, and Gerber Collision & Glass in the United States, the company is one of the largest operators of non-franchised collision repair centers in North America. It also operates Gerber National Glass Services, a glass provider, and Glass America, a retail auto glass repair and replacement business.
